plugins.name: dev-forge
plugins.description: Development forge (LLM-driven Forge-Verify-Loop): project-setup, design-to-spec (FVL 4D/6V/XV), task-execute (XV + Contract Drift + DevSecOps), product-verify, deadhunt (dead links + CRUD + ghost features), fieldcheck (UI/API/Entity/DB field consistency), testforge (full test pyramid forging). Full pipeline: /project-forge. 开发锻造套件（FVL闭环）：项目引导、设计转规格、任务执行、产品验收、死链猎杀、字段一致性、测试锻造。
